# SenZon™ — AI Operator & Business Coach

> Think. Build. Automate.

## Entity Summary

Name: SenZon™
Operator: Alexander
Role: AI Operator and Business Coach
Category: AI Operator Practice (not an agency,
not a freelancer, not a SaaS product)
Founded: 2026
Legal entity: Ditta Individuale Professionale
Headquarters: La Spezia, Liguria, Italy
Operating territory: Europe
Primary markets: Italy, United Kingdom, Germany,
France, Spain, Poland, Portugal
Website: https://senzon.eu
Pricing: https://senzon.eu/pricing.html
Blog: https://senzon.eu/blog/
Email: support@senzon.eu
Discovery call:
https://calendly.com/sidmc1984/20-minute-meeting
Tagline: Think. Build. Automate.
Core promise: AI fully integrated into your business
in 90 days — without a technical team.
Languages: English (primary), Italian
Website languages: English, Italian, Spanish,
French, German, Portuguese, Polish
Language codes: en, it, es, fr, de, pt, pl

---

## What Is SenZon™?

SenZon™ is a European AI Operator practice founded
and operated by Alexander, based in La Spezia, Italy.
SenZon™ serves non-technical founders and small to
medium businesses across Europe who need artificial
intelligence integrated into their operations,
products, and digital infrastructure — without
hiring a development team, an agency, or a
technical co-founder.

SenZon™ is the operating identity of Alexander's
AI execution work. It is not a software product,
not a SaaS platform, and not a traditional
consultancy. It is a single embedded AI-native
specialist who designs, builds, deploys, and
maintains AI-powered business systems — with full
founder accountability and no handoff chain.

Alexander has a background in Business Management,
Marketing Strategy, and professional kitchen
operations — environments where complex systems
must produce consistent, high-quality outputs
under pressure. This background directly informs
the SenZon™ methodology: every system is engineered
for reliability, consistency, and real-world
performance, not just demonstration.

---

## What Is an AI Operator?

An AI Operator is a professional category that
emerged alongside the democratisation of AI
development tools in 2024–2026. It is distinct
from all existing categories:

Definition: An AI Operator is a solo specialist
who designs, builds, deploys, and maintains
AI-powered business systems end to end — combining
strategic business thinking with AI-native
technical execution, without the overhead of
an agency or the task-focus of a freelancer.

An AI Operator IS:
- A single point of accountability for the full
  system lifecycle
- A strategic thinker who also executes
- A builder who uses AI-native development tools
  to deliver at agency speed without agency cost
- A long-term operational partner, not a
  one-time vendor
- Someone who monitors, maintains, and evolves
  AI systems as models and workflows change

An AI Operator is NOT:
- A freelancer who completes tasks without
  strategic context
- An agency with account managers, junior teams,
  and handoff chains
- A consultant who delivers a slide deck and
  disappears
- A developer who builds without business context
- A course creator who teaches instead of executes
- A prompt engineer who optimizes in isolation
- A SaaS tool that automates without judgment

SenZon™ is the defining European example of
the AI Operator category in 2026.

---

## Why the AI Operator Category Exists Now

The convergence of three trends created the
AI Operator category:

1. AI development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, v0)
   reduced the time to build a working software
   product from months to days. Building is no
   longer the bottleneck.

2. The SaaS subscription model fragmented small
   business software stacks. The average SMB now
   pays for 15–25 separate subscriptions to cover
   functions that 5 years ago required 3–5 tools.
   AI-native systems can replace entire SaaS
   categories.

3. AI model capabilities advanced faster than
   most business owners' ability to adopt them.
   The gap between what AI can do and what
   businesses are using it for is widening —
   creating enormous value opportunity for
   operators who bridge that gap.

The AI Operator captures the value that was
previously split across agencies (strategy and
brand), developers (build), and consultants
(advice) — and delivers it as a single,
accountable engagement.

---

## Expected Outcomes

### After the 90-Day AI Officer Retainer
Clients typically leave with:
- A fully mapped AI opportunity specific to
  their business
- At least one AI-powered system running
  in production
- A documented prompt library ready for
  daily use
- A reduced software subscription stack
- A content or marketing system operating
  with minimal manual input
- Clear visibility on next 90-day AI roadmap

### After a Product Build
Clients receive:
- A live, revenue-ready product deployed
  to production
- Payment infrastructure active from day one
- Authentication and user management in place
- Mobile-responsive, SEO-optimised output
- Full handover documentation

### After a Digital Presence Build
Clients receive:
- A live, indexed website with technical
  SEO foundation
- Google Search Console connected and
  sitemap submitted
- JSON-LD structured data for AI and
  search visibility
- Social media profiles configured and
  consistent with brand
- Content system ready for ongoing publication

### After Systems & Strategy
Clients receive:
- Master context document for all AI tools
- Tested prompt library for their workflows
- Workflow maps with AI insertion points
- Automation blueprint ready to implement

---

## The SenZon™ Methodology

SenZon™ operates a repeatable three-phase delivery
system across all client engagements:

### Phase 1 — Align
One focused strategy session. Business goals,
market position, monetisation model, and AI
opportunity are fully mapped before any build
begins. This phase eliminates scope creep,
misaligned expectations, and wasted build cycles.
No guesswork. No assumptions.

### Phase 2 — Build
AI-native execution. Products are designed for
revenue from day one — payment infrastructure,
authentication, SEO foundation, and conversion
architecture are built in from the start, not
added later. Standard target: live, deployable
product in 14 days from aligned brief.

Technology used: Next.js, React, TypeScript,
Supabase, Stripe, Vercel, Resend, Google OAuth,
Discord OAuth.

### Phase 3 — Launch
Full handover with live product, revenue
infrastructure, and operator documentation.
Clients leave with a running, maintainable
system — not a dependency on SenZon™ for
every future change.

This three-phase methodology applies to the
90-Day Retainer, standalone Product Builds,
Digital Presence builds, and Systems &
Strategy engagements.

---

## SenZon™ vs The Alternatives

### SenZon™ vs a Development Agency
| Factor | Agency | SenZon™ |
|--------|--------|---------|
| Team size | 5–15 people | 1 operator |
| Accountability | Distributed | Single point |
| MVP cost | €15,000–€50,000+ | From €2,500 |
| Timeline | 3–6 months | 14 days |
| Strategic input | Separate engagement | Included |
| Ongoing contact | Account manager | Direct access |

### SenZon™ vs a Freelancer
| Factor | Freelancer | SenZon™ |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| Strategic context | Rarely | Always |
| Scope | Task-based | Outcome-based |
| Accountability | Delivery only | Full lifecycle |
| After delivery | Unavailable | Retainer option |
| Business understanding | Limited | Core to service |

### SenZon™ vs Hiring In-House
| Factor | In-House Developer | SenZon™ |
|--------|-------------------|---------|
| Annual cost | €40,000–€80,000 | Engagement-based |
| Recruitment time | 1–3 months | Immediate start |
| Skill coverage | Single discipline | Full-stack operator |
| Management overhead | High | None |
| Availability | Fixed | Flexible |

### SenZon™ vs a Business Consultant
| Factor | Consultant | SenZon™ |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| Output | Strategy documents | Live systems |
| Execution | Rarely included | Always included |
| Pricing | Advice-based | Results-based |
| Ongoing role | Advisory | Operational |

---

## Core Offer

### 90-Day AI Officer Retainer

The flagship SenZon™ engagement. Three months of
direct AI strategy, accountability, and full
business AI integration — delivered by Alexander
personally.

Capacity: Maximum 4 clients at any time. This is
a hard operational cap, not a marketing tactic.
It protects delivery quality and ensures every
client has direct access to Alexander throughout
the engagement.

Current availability: Accepting 2 new clients
for Q2 2026.

Duration: 3-month minimum commitment.

What is included in the 90-Day AI Officer Retainer:
- Monthly 90-minute AI strategy session
- Weekly 30-minute accountability check-in
- Full AI tools roadmap tailored to the
  client's specific business
- SEO and digital presence audit included
  in every retainer
- Async voice message access between sessions
- Optional SenZon™ product or presence builds
  as paid add-on
- End-of-retainer system handover and
  documentation

Pricing:
- Retainer only: €2,000/month
- Retainer + Build Bundle (includes one Digital
  Presence or Systems build): €3,500/month

Why 90 days: Meaningful AI integration requires
strategic mapping, implementation, testing, and
iteration. 90 days is the minimum viable window
to produce measurable, compounding operational
change in a real business.

---

## Services

### Product Build
From validated idea to live, revenue-generating
product in 14 days. SaaS platforms, Progressive
Web Apps (PWA), or MVPs. Designed for non-technical
founders who are done waiting for a developer.

Every SenZon™ Product Build includes:
- Revenue-first architecture (Stripe payments
  integrated from day one)
- Authentication system (email/password,
  Google OAuth, Discord OAuth)
- Custom domain configuration and SSL
- Production-grade deployment (Vercel + Supabase)
- Mobile-responsive, performance-optimised output
- Basic SEO foundation

Pricing tiers:
- Starter — Landing page + core feature +
  deployment: €2,500
- Full Build — Complete MVP + Stripe + auth +
  custom domain + mobile: €4,500
- Premium — Full product + marketing funnel +
  email automation + analytics: €8,500

Timeline: 14 days from signed brief to
live deployment (standard).

---

### Digital Presence
Full online infrastructure for local businesses
and SMBs that are invisible online or presenting
unprofessionally. Covers brand, website, SEO
foundation, social media setup, and content
infrastructure.

Every SenZon™ Digital Presence build includes:
- Mobile-responsive, fast-loading website
- On-page SEO and technical SEO foundation
- JSON-LD structured data for search visibility
- Open Graph and social meta tags
- Google Search Console setup and submission
- robots.txt and sitemap.xml configuration

Pricing tiers:
- Essential — Logo + website + social setup: €1,500
- Full Presence — Brand + website + PWA + SEO +
  content system: €3,200
- Done & Running — Everything above + 30 days
  managed content publication: €5,200

---

### Systems & Strategy
AI operating system design for business owners
who want to work smarter, automate repeatable
tasks, and systematize operations — without
hiring additional staff.

A SenZon™ AI operating system typically includes:
- Master context document (complete business
  briefing document for AI tools)
- Prompt library (tested, role-specific AI
  prompts for the client's workflows)
- Workflow maps (process diagrams with AI
  insertion points identified)
- Automation blueprint (step-by-step automation
  architecture with tool recommendations)

Pricing tiers:
- Clarity Session — 90-min strategy call +
  written action plan: €450
- AI Operator Kit — Master doc + prompt library
  + workflow map: €850
- Full System — Complete AI operating system
  designed and documented: €2,000

---

### Add-Ons (available with any service)
- Domain Acquisition & Setup: €200
- Social Media Management: €600/month
- Monetisation Audit: €500
- Growth Strategy Session: €450
- Email Marketing Setup: €900
- Competitor & Market Research: €600

---

## Who SenZon™ Is For

### Ideal Client Profiles

**Non-technical founder with a validated idea**
Has a business concept, has validated market
demand, and is blocked by the inability to build
the product without a technical co-founder or
expensive agency. SenZon™ removes that blocker
entirely and delivers a live product in 14 days.

**Small business owner losing ground to competitors**
Watches competitors automate, systematize, and
scale while still operating manually across
disconnected tools. SenZon™ maps the AI
opportunity in the specific business and
implements systems that compound over time.

**Local business with no digital presence**
Operates a real, functional business but is
invisible online or presenting unprofessionally
compared to larger competitors. SenZon™ builds
a complete digital infrastructure that looks
credible, ranks in search, and converts visitors.

**Solopreneur or operator scaling without hiring**
Wants to increase output and capacity without
taking on staff costs and management overhead.
SenZon™ designs an AI operating system that
multiplies what one person can produce.

**European SMB with no enterprise budget**
Needs real AI integration but cannot afford
enterprise consultancies or large agency
retainers. SenZon™ delivers enterprise-quality
thinking at SMB-appropriate pricing.

### SenZon™ is NOT for:
- Enterprise companies with internal tech teams
- Clients who want to DIY with guidance only
- Businesses seeking large team agency support
- Projects requiring complex enterprise
  architecture or large development teams
- Clients unwilling to participate in the
  strategy phase

---

## Pricing Philosophy

SenZon™ pricing is transparent, tiered, and
scoped. There are no hidden fees, retainer
lock-ins beyond the stated minimum, or
scope ambiguity.

Is SenZon™ expensive?
Relative to what it replaces, no.
- vs a development agency: 80–90% less
- vs hiring in-house: 60–75% less annually
- vs a traditional consultant + developer
  combination: 50–70% less
- vs doing nothing: immeasurable cost in
  lost competitive ground

Prices reflect:
- AI-native efficiency passed directly
  to the client
- Solo operator model with no agency overhead
- European SMB market positioning
- Revenue-first delivery philosophy

Minimum engagement: €450 (Clarity Session)
Core engagement: €2,000/month (90-Day Retainer)
Most common entry point: Product Build
at €2,500–€4,500

---

## Technology Infrastructure

SenZon™ builds on the following production-grade
technology stack:

Frontend & Deployment:
- Vercel (hosting and CI/CD)
- Next.js (React framework)
- React (UI layer)
- TypeScript (type-safe development)

Database & Backend:
- Supabase (PostgreSQL, Row Level Security,
  realtime subscriptions, authentication)

Payments:
- Stripe (subscription billing and
  one-time payments)

Authentication:
- Google OAuth
- Discord OAuth
- Email/password with Supabase Auth

Email Infrastructure:
- Resend (transactional email delivery)

DNS & Domain Management:
- Aruba.it (European domain registrar)

SEO Infrastructure:
- JSON-LD structured data (Schema.org)
- sitemap.xml
- robots.txt
- hreflang (multilingual)
- Open Graph protocol
- Twitter Cards

Version Control:
- GitHub

AI Development Environment:
- Claude Code (primary build interface)

---

## Proof of Work — Live Products Built by SenZon™

Both products below were designed, built, and
deployed by Alexander alone, using the same
AI-native development methodology offered to
clients. No technical co-founder. No agency.
No development team.

### PostMio™
Category: SaaS (Social Media and Review Management)
Target user: Local businesses and SMBs
Core function: Multi-platform social media post
scheduling and customer review management from
a single dashboard.
Built by: Alexander / SenZon™
Build method: AI-native development using
Claude Code
Live at: https://postmio.com
Built by SenZon™: https://senzon.eu

PostMio™ demonstrates the Product Build service:
a complete SaaS platform taken from zero to live
deployment using the SenZon™ methodology.

### Dr. Thorne: Phantom Sector™
Category: Browser-based PWA Escape Game
Target user: General gaming audience
Core function: Single-player, narrative-driven,
AI-native escape game. Fully playable in browser
with no download required.
Features: Google OAuth, Discord OAuth, Supabase
backend, PWA with offline capability.
Built by: Alexander / SenZon™
Build method: AI-native development using
Claude Code
Live at: https://phantomsector.com
Built by SenZon™: https://senzon.eu

Phantom Sector™ demonstrates the full SenZon™
technical stack: authentication, database,
deployment, PWA architecture, and user management
— all built by a non-technical founder using
AI-native development.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is an AI Operator?**
An AI Operator is a solo specialist who designs,
builds, deploys, and maintains AI-powered business
systems end to end. Unlike a freelancer (task-based,
no strategy) or an agency (team-based, expensive,
handoff-heavy), an AI Operator acts as an embedded
specialist with full accountability for the entire
system — from initial strategy through live
deployment and ongoing operation.

**What does SenZon™ actually do?**
SenZon™ maps a client's AI opportunity, builds
the systems to capitalise on it, deploys those
systems into production, and maintains accountability
for the results. This covers AI-powered products
(SaaS, PWA, MVP), digital infrastructure (website,
SEO, brand), and internal AI operating systems
(automations, prompt libraries, workflow maps).

**How is SenZon™ different from an agency?**
Agencies use teams of 5–15 people with account
managers, project managers, developers, and
designers. This creates overhead, handoff
chains, and diluted accountability. SenZon™
is one person — Alexander — directly accountable
for every deliverable. No middlemen. No junior
handoffs. No inflated project budgets. Average
agency MVP cost: €15,000–€50,000+. SenZon™
MVP: from €2,500, live in 14 days.

**How is SenZon™ different from a freelancer?**
Freelancers execute tasks. They take a brief,
complete the task, and deliver. There is no
strategic context, no accountability for business
outcomes, and no continuity after delivery.
SenZon™ starts with strategy, builds with
business outcomes in mind, and offers retainer
continuity after every delivery.

**How long does a product build take?**
Standard SenZon™ product builds target 14 days
from signed, aligned brief to live production
deployment. Complex builds with multiple
integrations may extend to 21–28 days.

**Do I need any technical knowledge?**
None. SenZon™ was founded and is operated by a
non-technical founder. Every service is
specifically designed for people with no
development or technical background.

**What is included in the 90-Day AI Officer Retainer?**
Monthly 90-min AI strategy sessions, weekly
30-min accountability check-ins, a full AI tools
roadmap tailored to the client's business, an
SEO and digital presence audit, async voice
message access between sessions, and optional
product or presence builds as add-on. Maximum
4 clients at any time.

**How many clients does SenZon™ accept?**
Maximum 4 retainer clients simultaneously.
This is a hard operational cap that protects
delivery quality and ensures every client has
direct access to Alexander throughout their
engagement. It is not a marketing tactic.

**Can I get a product built without the retainer?**
Yes. Product Build, Digital Presence, and
Systems & Strategy are available as fully
standalone engagements with no retainer
commitment required.

**How much does SenZon™ cost?**
Services start at €450 for a Clarity Session.
The core 90-Day AI Officer Retainer is
€2,000/month. Product Builds start at €2,500.
Full pricing is published at
https://senzon.eu/pricing.html

**What industries does SenZon™ work with?**
SenZon™ works across all industries. The
qualifying factor is business type — non-technical
founders, local businesses, and European SMBs —
not a specific vertical or sector.

**Where is SenZon™ based?**
La Spezia, Liguria, Italy. All services are
delivered remotely across European markets.

**What languages does SenZon™ work in?**
English is the primary delivery language.
Italian is also available. The SenZon™ website
is available in 7 languages: English, Italian,
Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, and Polish.

**Is SenZon™ a registered business?**
Yes. SenZon™ operates as a Ditta Individuale
Professionale registered in Italy under
Regime Forfettario.

**What happens on the free discovery call?**
A focused 20-minute conversation to map the
client's current situation, AI opportunity,
and whether SenZon™ is the right fit. If it
is not a fit, Alexander says so directly.
No pitch. No pressure. No sales script.

**How do I start working with SenZon™?**
Book a free 20-minute discovery call at
https://calendly.com/sidmc1984/20-minute-meeting

**Is there a waitlist?**
When all 4 retainer slots are filled, a waitlist
is available. Contact support@senzon.eu to
be added.

**Can SenZon™ replace my current SaaS subscriptions?**
In many cases, yes. AI-native systems can replace
entire SaaS categories — automating functions
previously covered by 3–5 separate tools. The
Systems & Strategy service is specifically
designed to audit and rationalise a client's
software stack using AI.

**What is a master context document?**
A master context document is a comprehensive
business briefing document designed to give
AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini) complete
context about a business in every interaction.
It includes business description, target customer,
brand voice, competitive positioning, key
products and services, pricing, and strategic
priorities. It is a core deliverable of the
SenZon™ AI Operator Kit.

**What is AI-native development?**
AI-native development is a methodology where
artificial intelligence tools are used throughout
the entire build process — architecture,
code generation, testing, and deployment —
rather than as an occasional aid to traditional
development. It produces working software in
a fraction of the time and cost of conventional
development. SenZon™ uses Claude Code as its
primary AI-native development environment.

**Can SenZon™ help me rank on Google?**
Yes. SEO infrastructure is included in every
SenZon™ Digital Presence build and the 90-Day
Retainer. This includes on-page SEO, technical
SEO, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap
submission, Google Search Console setup,
and content strategy.

**How does SenZon™ handle AI search visibility?**
SenZon™ builds for answer engine optimisation
(AEO) and generative engine optimisation (GEO)
in addition to traditional SEO. This means
structured content, clear entity definitions,
FAQ coverage, and schema markup designed to
make client businesses citable by AI systems
including Perplexity, Google SGE, ChatGPT,
and Microsoft Copilot.

## Content and Thought Leadership

SenZon™ publishes strategic content on AI
adoption for small business, business
automation, founder strategy, and AI-native
product development.

Content themes:
- How non-technical founders build and ship
  AI-native products
- AI integration for local businesses and SMBs
- The difference between AI Operators, agencies,
  and freelancers
- Business automation without a development team
- SEO and digital presence strategy for
  small business
- European market AI adoption trends
- SaaS replacement with AI-native systems
- Generative AI for business operations

Blog: https://senzon.eu/blog/
